markets.rules_primary: If Kamonwan Yodpetch wins the Desai vs Yodpetch professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Astana Round of 16 after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Desai vs Yodpetch professional tennis match in the 2026 W15 Astana Round of 16 after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the price data is released.
markets.rules_primary: If the reported weighted average of the Chemical Lean Beef trim (0.65%) on USDA is above $3.55/lb after issuance and in July 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market resolves based on whether the price ($/lb) of Chemical Lean Beef Trim, as published by USDA, meets or exceeds the specified strike value at any point during the time period. The relevant data source is the USDA AMS National/Regional Weekly Boneless Processing Beef and Beef Trimmings report. A single qualifying weekly print at or above a given strike is sufficient to resolve that strike to Yes; no further crossings are required. If a given week's report shows zero reported trades or a $0.00 weighted average for this grade, that week's data will be treated as unavailable, and the most recently available valid weekly value will be used in its place for purposes of determining whether the strike was met. If no valid data is available for the entire time period, all markets resolve to No. Prices are denominated in USD per hundredweight (lb) and rounded to two decimal places. Unless otherwise specified, prices reflect USDA's reported FOB Plant negotiated sales basis and exclude any additional handling, freight, or transaction fees. Any revisions or corrections to a weekly report published after that report's initial release will not affect market resolution.
markets.title: Will reported weighted average of the Chemical Lean Beef trim (0.65%) on USDA be above $3.55 in July 2026?

markets.rules_primary: If the reported weighted average of the Chemical Lean Beef trim (0.65%) on USDA is above $3.10/lb after issuance and in July 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: This market resolves based on whether the price ($/lb) of Chemical Lean Beef Trim, as published by USDA, meets or exceeds the specified strike value at any point during the time period. The relevant data source is the USDA AMS National/Regional Weekly Boneless Processing Beef and Beef Trimmings report. A single qualifying weekly print at or above a given strike is sufficient to resolve that strike to Yes; no further crossings are required. If a given week's report shows zero reported trades or a $0.00 weighted average for this grade, that week's data will be treated as unavailable, and the most recently available valid weekly value will be used in its place for purposes of determining whether the strike was met. If no valid data is available for the entire time period, all markets resolve to No. Prices are denominated in USD per hundredweight (lb) and rounded to two decimal places. Unless otherwise specified, prices reflect USDA's reported FOB Plant negotiated sales basis and exclude any additional handling, freight, or transaction fees. Any revisions or corrections to a weekly report published after that report's initial release will not affect market resolution.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Alexander Zverev wins set 3 in the Arthur Fery vs Alexander Zverev professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Semifinal, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Arthur Fery vs Alexander Zverev professional tennis match in the 2026 Wimbledon Men Singles Semifinal. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks). If a retirement occurs, all markets that can be unconditionally settled based on play already completed will resolve accordingly. Any markets that cannot be unconditionally settled will resolve to Fair Market Price, as determined at the sole discretion of the Exchange.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Bruno Guimaraes's next club is Real Madrid before Oct 2, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Transfer Details
The market resolves to Yes if Bruno Guimaraes signs a contract to join Real Madrid, whether via transfer fee or as a free agent.  
If Bruno Guimaraes signs with a club and is immediately loaned out, the signing club resolves to Yes and all others resolve to No.  
The market resolves to Yes if Bruno Guimaraes is loaned to Real Madrid (temporary transfer of registration).  
If Bruno Guimaraes is currently signed to Real Madrid, the market resolves to Yes if re-signs or extends his contract with Real Madrid, or remains with the club without transferring.  
The market resolves to Yes if an official agreement is announced for Bruno Guimaraes to join Real Madrid at a future date (e.g., a pre-contract or transfer effective in a future window).
If Bruno Guimaraes's current contract expires and they have not signed with any club, then all markets resolve to No
markets.title: Where will Bruno Guimaraes go next?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Bruno Guimaraes's next club is PSG before Oct 2, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Transfer Details
The market resolves to Yes if Bruno Guimaraes signs a contract to join PSG, whether via transfer fee or as a free agent.  
If Bruno Guimaraes signs with a club and is immediately loaned out, the signing club resolves to Yes and all others resolve to No.  
The market resolves to Yes if Bruno Guimaraes is loaned to PSG (temporary transfer of registration).  
If Bruno Guimaraes is currently signed to PSG, the market resolves to Yes if re-signs or extends his contract with PSG, or remains with the club without transferring.
